title: SimpleEnhanced
description: Simple Enhanced is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack that keeps the vanilla Minecraft feel while adding subtle improvements to gameplay, visuals, and quality of life.
body:
#
🔥SimpleEnhanced

The real performance modpack

for fabric
![Placeholder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e39d9d44526604181e2d50e41cddbdbbd77981.png) ##
⚡SE Features
- Enjoy higher FPS with performance-enhancing mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium). These mods deliver smooth gameplay and give you that full OptiFine-like experience. - Enhance your everyday Minecraft experience with handy mods like [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) and [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby). These mods bring you some of the best quality-of-life features! - High Quality with mods like Blur+ and BetterF3 ![Placeholder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e39d9d44526604181e2d50e41cddbdbbd77981.png) ##
❓About This Modpack
We aim to create high-quality, performance-focused modpacks that improve your everyday Minecraft experience – and this is the very first one from **ApfelGemeinde**! ![Placeholder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e39d9d44526604181e2d50e41cddbdbbd77981.png) ##
🆕Upcomming features
- More Performance - More Quality - More compatibility (Forge, Neoforge) ![Placeholder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03e39d9d44526604181e2d50e41cddbdbbd77981.png)

SimpleEnhanced is not affiliated with Minecraft.

Developed by Ju

Thank you for downloading this modpack! Modpack created with ❤️
